title: juncus articulatus subsp. aquaticus
intro: Juncus articulatus subsp. aquaticus, also known as aquatic jointed rush, is a sub-species of the Juncus articulatus plant, which is a type of aquatic rush that grows in wetlands and shallow water. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Juncus articulatus subsp. aquaticus include its ability to support immune function, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote wound healing. Juncus articulatus subsp. aquaticus can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in skincare products and creams to harness its medicinal properties.
